evaluation_method: Machine translation evaluation on the WMT'14 English-French and French-English datasets from the Conference on Machine Translation (WMT) 2014 shared task. Models generate translations of source-language sentences into the target language. Evaluation uses BLEU score computed with multi-bleu.perl using XLM's tokenization, as specified in the GPT-3 paper for comparison with prior unsupervised NMT work. The benchmark tests zero-shot, one-shot, and few-shot translation capabilities.
